name: House Roaz
summary: Legal-industrial noble house anchoring strict enforcement, quarry extraction, and strategic antimagic development.
motive: Preserve order, expand strategic strength, and ensure magic never outruns state control.
power_relations: Commands ORE and the Iron Accord while coordinating with allied magical specialists when useful
visible_membership_base: Enforcers, engineers, clerks, miners, covert operatives.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The same systems that make Roaz reliable also make it feared, watched, and prone to legitimacy strain.
